steps.title: Find the growth factor
steps.content: An increase of $40\%$ means the new number of views is $100\%+40\%=140\%$ of the previous number. The growth factor for each period is $1.40$.

steps.title: Count the growth periods
steps.content:
The number of views changes once every $3$ days. After $x$ days, the number of complete model periods is
$$
\frac{x}{3}
$$

steps.title: Build the model
steps.content: Start with $245$ views and multiply by $1.40$ once for each $3$-day period: $$ f(x)=245(1.40)^{\frac{x}{3}} $$ The answer is C.
